name: record-budget-overrides-shop-default
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'a record-level budget overrides the shop default' case (S3.3): elapsed (7200s) exceeds the real shop default (1800s) but the record's own budget (99999s) does not, so the record's budget must win and the state must stay dispatched. This vector fixes the record's own budget rather than depending on any injected default, so it is fully self-contained under the runner contract (the shop-default-FALLBACK case itself, where no per-record budget exists, stays the carved-out imperative test). Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
